mapper.insert: insert into fault_iden_sample ( condition_label, bearing_code, sample_no, file_name, source_file, file_size, data_usage, aircraft_id, subsystem_id, equipment_id, component_id, create_time ) values ( #{conditionLabel}, #{bearingCode}, #{sampleNo}, #{fileName}, #{sourceFile}, #{fileSize}, #{dataUsage}, #{aircraftId}, #{subsystemId}, #{equipmentId}, #{componentId}, now() )
mapper.select: select id, condition_label, bearing_code, sample_no, file_name, source_file, file_size, data_usage, aircraft_id, subsystem_id, equipment_id, component_id, create_time from fault_iden_sample where id = #{id}
select condition_label as conditionLabel, count(distinct bearing_code) as bearingCount, count(1) as sampleCount from fault_iden_sample group by condition_label order by condition_label

select bearing_code as bearingCode, count(1) as sampleCount, min(sample_no) as minSampleNo, max(sample_no) as maxSampleNo from fault_iden_sample where condition_label = #{conditionLabel} group by bearing_code order by bearing_code

select count(1) from fault_iden_sample where 1 = 1
and data_usage = #{dataUsage}
and source_file like concat('%', #{uploadBatchId}, '%')
and ( file_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or source_file like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or condition_label like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or bearing_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

choose.when: and (subsystem_id is null or subsystem_id = '') and (equipment_id is null or equipment_id = '') and (component_id is null or component_id = '')
and (equipment_id is null or equipment_id = '') and (component_id is null or component_id = '')

mapper.select: select count(1) from fault_iden_sample where condition_label = concat('object_', #{targetLevel})
